description:
compile_fn's block-walking loop contains an ~950-line match on &blk.terminator (lines ~3788-4737)
covering all 8 Term variants (Halt, Return, Goto, If, Call, TailCall, CallClosure,
TailCallClosure). Extract into a free function.

ADD before compile_fn:

  fn emit_terminator<M: cranelift_module::Module>(
      b: &mut FunctionBuilder<'_>,
      jmod: &mut M,
      env: &CodegenEnv<'_>,
      module_types: &crate::ir_typer::ModuleTypes,
      schemas: &[Schema],
      var_env: &HashMap<u32, VarBinding>,
      blk: &crate::fz_ir::Block,
      block_map: &HashMap<u32, ir::Block>,
      frame_ptr: Option<ir::Value>,
      host_ctx: Option<ir::Value>,
      cont_param: Option<ir::Value>,
      is_native: bool,
      is_cont_fn: bool,
      cont_ptr_known_null: bool,
      this_spec_id: u32,
      f: &crate::fz_ir::FnIr,
      source: &crate::fz_ir::SourceInfo,
  ) -> Result<(), CodegenError>

Inside the function body, reconstruct resolve_callee_sid and resolve_cont_sid from env fields
(fn_types, module, spec_registry are all in env; module_types is passed separately).
The closures currently defined in compile_fn can be re-scoped here.

REPLACE the match block in compile_fn's loop with:
  emit_terminator(&mut b, jmod, env, module_types, schemas, &var_env, blk,
      &block_map, frame_ptr, host_ctx, cont_param,
      is_native, is_cont_fn, cont_ptr_known_null, this_spec_id, f, source)?;

NOTE: var_env is read-only inside all terminator arms — safe to pass as &HashMap.

cargo build must produce zero warnings. All tests must pass.
title: fz-cg3.1 extract emit_terminator from compile_fn
